# CWE-307 — Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-307-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	Email string
	Hash  string
}

// Vulnerable: no backoff or lockout on repeated failed logins.
func PasswordLogin(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	email := c.PostForm("email")
	var u User
	if db.Where("email = ?", email).First(&u).Error != nil {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "bad creds"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"token": "issued"})
}
